title: Gooey Rich Greek Fettuccine Loukoumades
description: A rich and fluffy Greek dish featuring fettuccine, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a flexitarian-friendly twist in the form of loukoumades.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the fettuccine according to package instructions until al dente.
Drain the fettuccine and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic until fragrant.
Add the sun dried tomatoes, artichoke hearts, and kalamata olives to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice, salt, and black pepper.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked fettuccine, skillet mixture, and crumbled feta cheese.
Mix well to combine and adjust seasoning as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and let it sit for 10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the fettuccine mixture in small balls, similar to loukoumades, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
